summary: Iteration 22 — Comprehensive backend + frontend regression for Garment ERP. Backend: 49/55 pytest pass (89%). Production PO infinite-loop regression VERIFIED FIXED (only 2 /api/production-pos calls on module open vs. previous infinite loop). Found 1 CRITICAL backend bug: GET /api/production-pos/{po_id} (and likely GET /api/vendor-shipments/{sid}) returns 500 due to undefined function `enrich_with_product_photos`. Manual invoice flow blocked: POST /api/invoices rejects with 'source_po_id wajib diisi'; spec mentioned /api/manual-invoices but route does not exist. Buyer Shipment caps (M-1 0-qty reject + C-1 phantom shipment reject) verified working. Pagination envelope verified. PDF export for production-po works (>1KB content). Smart Import upload endpoint reachable. All 27 list endpoints reachable & 200 OK.

critical.issue: Returns 500 — NameError: name 'enrich_with_product_photos' is not defined (server.py line 752). Same call exists at line 1215 inside GET /api/vendor-shipments/{sid} so that endpoint is likely broken too. Function is referenced but never defined anywhere in /app/backend/server.py (or routes/). Blocks PO detail view in frontend (Production PO 'view' icon, Buat PO edit-mode prefill, etc.).

Rejects every payload without `source_po_id` with 400 'source_po_id wajib diisi'. Spec called for /api/manual-invoices endpoint but that route does NOT exist in server.py. Either (a) add a dedicated /api/manual-invoices POST that allows null source_po_id, or (b) make source_po_id optional when invoice_type is manual. Currently impossible to create AR/AP invoices not tied to a PO via API. This blocks the entire 'Invoice Manual' module flow.

minor.issue: Could not be tested due to upstream invoice creation failure. Unverified.

passed_tests: REGRESSION VERIFIED: /api/production-pos called only 2x on Production PO module open (threshold ≤5). Infinite-loop fix (DataTable.jsx fetcherRef) holds.
Production PO module renders within 6s with 62 POs in pagination, 0 console errors, 0 page errors, 0 'Memuat data...' stuck.
Auth: superadmin login OK, wrong password 401 with detail field, /api/auth/me OK.
Master Data CRUD: garment, buyer, 2 products, 2 accessories all created + listed successfully.
Production PO create: POST /api/production-pos returns 201 with 2 items + accepted po-accessories link (qty_needed=200).
Pagination envelope present on /api/production-pos and /api/products: items, total, page, per_page, total_pages.
Buyer Shipment M-1 (0-qty dispatch) correctly rejected 400 with Indonesian error message.
Buyer Shipment C-1 (phantom shipment without production) correctly rejected 400.
Payment endpoint reachable; partial+full payment flow blocked only by upstream invoice creation issue.
Smart Import upload endpoint reachable (200/422 acceptable).

27 list endpoints all return 200: garments, buyers, products, accessories, production-pos, vendor-shipments, buyer-shipments, production-jobs, production-returns, production-variances, invoices, payments, users, activity-logs, company-settings, dashboard, financial-recap, accounts-payable, accounts-receivable, distribusi-kerja, production-monitoring-v2, serial-list, pdf-export-configs, pdf-export-columns, roles, permissions, reminders.
PRODUKSI sidebar nav: Vendor Shipment, Buyer Shipment, Distribusi Kerja, Monitoring Produksi all render 0 errors.
LAPORAN & TOOLS sidebar nav: Laporan, Smart Import render 0 errors.
action_items: [CRITICAL] Define `enrich_with_product_photos(items, db)` helper in server.py — likely should look up product photos by product_id and attach to each item dict. This unblocks GET /api/production-pos/{po_id} AND GET /api/vendor-shipments/{sid}.

[HIGH] Either add POST /api/manual-invoices endpoint OR make source_po_id optional in POST /api/invoices when invoice_type/type is manual. Without this, the entire Invoice Manual UI module cannot create invoices.
[MINOR] After fixing above, retest invoice/payment chain and PDF export type=invoice.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 752 + 1215: `enrich_with_product_photos` is called but never defined — would have been caught by ruff/static analysis. Recommend running ruff before merging.
server.py is 5679 lines — should be split into modules (master_data.py, production.py, finance.py, etc.). File-size lint rule violation.

POST /api/invoices unconditionally requires source_po_id but the system has 'Invoice Manual' UI module — there's an architectural mismatch. Suggest splitting endpoints: POST /api/invoices/auto (system-generated, requires source_po_id) vs POST /api/manual-invoices (admin-created, free-form).
Buyer Shipment validation logic (C-1 cap + M-1 zero-qty reject) is well-implemented with clear Indonesian error messages — good.
Pagination envelope is consistent across endpoints — good. Some legacy endpoints (e.g., /api/production-jobs, /api/garments) appear to not paginate by default; verify frontend handles both shapes.

success_rate.backend: 89% (49/55 pytest cases pass; 6 fail rooted in 2 underlying bugs)
success_rate.frontend: 100% on critical regression (Production PO infinite-loop fix verified, 0 console errors, 2 API calls observed vs. infinite loop before)

seed_data_creation: Created and then cleaned up: 1 vendor (PT Vendor Sejahtera <ts>), 1 buyer (CV Buyer Mandiri <ts>), 2 products (KAOS-<ts>, JKT-<ts>), 2 accessories (Kancing Plastik <ts>, Resleting YKK <ts>), 1 PO (PO-TEST-<ts>) with 2 items + 1 po_accessory.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two backend bugs block deeper E2E: (1) define enrich_with_product_photos to unblock PO/vendor-shipment detail GETs, (2) fix manual invoice creation path. Vendor shipment → inspection → job → progress → variance → buyer shipment → return chain was NOT fully tested end-to-end because creating a vendor shipment + inspection programmatically is multi-step (POST /api/vendor-shipments → confirm receive → POST /api/vendor-material-inspections → POST /api/production-jobs). After 2 critical fixes above, write a follow-up test that walks the full chain to verify I-1 defect-adjusted capacity, C-2 return cap, C-3 total_shipped_to_buyer aggregation, and variance Reported→Acknowledged→Resolved transitions.
rca of the issue: GET /api/production-pos/{po_id}: server.py line 752 calls `enrich_with_product_photos(items, db)` but this symbol is undefined → NameError → 500. Same call on line 1215 (vendor-shipments detail). Reproduce: GET /api/production-pos/<any-existing-id> with valid Bearer token. Mitigation: implement helper that does `for it in items: if it.get('product_id'): photo = await db.products.find_one({'id': it['product_id']}, {'photo':1, 'photo_url':1, '_id':0}); it['product_photo'] = (photo or {}).get('photo') or (photo or {}).get('photo_url')` then `return items`.
